overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a white aerodyne flying vehicle navigating Night City at night. The vehicle ascends from the waterfront, weaves between neon-lit skyscrapers, lands briefly on a rooftop, then continues over highway interchanges and industrial districts with prominent holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront commercial district with flying vehicle docks

events.description: vehicle ascends rapidly from near-water level between skyscrapers
flying into a canyon of close-proximity high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: piloting a white aerodyne vehicle upward from the waterfront, navigating between the DELAMAIN building and surrounding skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall commercial building with illuminated DELAMAIN signage on the facade
low-rise waterfront structures and piers along the dark water
cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated window patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a white aerodyne vehicle ascending from the Night City waterfront at night. The camera follows from behind as the vehicle climbs past the DELAMAIN building on the right, navigating between illuminated glass skyscrapers while the dark water recedes below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop landing zone with panoramic city view

events.description: vehicle slows and lands on a building rooftop helipad
vehicle takes off from rooftop and resumes flight

agents.ego_description: landing the aerodyne on a skyscraper helipad, pausing briefly, then taking off again to survey the sprawling city lights from high altitude

entered.detail: expansive view of the illuminated city grid stretching to the horizon
dark silhouettes of hills on the city outskirts
flat landing surface with markings on top of a skyscraper

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises at high altitude above the city, revealing a panoramic view of Night City's illuminated grid and distant mountains. It descends to land on a rooftop helipad, pauses momentarily, then takes off again, leaving the waterfront district behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with moving traffic

events.description: flying over illuminated highway interchange with visible traffic light trails below
transitioning from commercial high-rises to industrial district architecture

agents.ego_description: flying over a complex highway interchange, observing the light trails of traffic below while passing the building marked with '02' signage

entered.detail: complex network of illuminated elevated roadways and ramps
tall building with large white '02' and 'SOLAR' text illuminated on the facade
multi-level road infrastructure with moving vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies over a sprawling highway interchange, with the building marked '02' visible on the right. Below, the light trails of moderate traffic flow along the curved ramps and elevated roadways as the scene transitions toward industrial architecture.

events.description: entering the Coastview district with distinct industrial waterfront architecture
passing close to large neon signage creating localized bright illumination

agents.ego_description: descending to lower altitude near the industrial waterfront, flying past the Grand Imperial building and dock structures with prominent neon signage

entered.detail: dark water reflecting city lights along the industrial shore
low-rise warehouse structures with industrial lighting
building with large orange 'GRA D IMPER' signage
tall industrial chimneys silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Descending toward the industrial waterfront, the vehicle flies past dock buildings and the prominent 'GRA D IMPER' sign. The water below reflects the city lights while industrial smokestacks rise in the distance, marking the transition into the Coastview district.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit urban canyon with holographic displays

events.description: entering the West Wind Estate area with dense holographic advertising
flying through intense blue and purple holographic light projections

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow corridor of skyscrapers adorned with large blue fan-shaped and purple face holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large blue illuminated fan-shaped holographic display on building facade
tall building with prominent purple neon face signage
tightly packed high-rise buildings forming an urban canyon
cluster of buildings with extensive neon and holographic lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense urban canyon in the West Wind Estate, flying between tightly packed skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements. A blue fan-shaped hologram dominates the left while a purple neon face glows ahead, creating an immersive neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a white aerodyne ascends from a dark waterfront and navigates through the neon-lit verticality of Night City toward its industrial outskirts. It begins by climbing past the Delamain building, weaving between illuminated glass skyscrapers as the water recedes far below. As the vehicle reaches a high altitude, the view expands into a panoramic vista of the city's glowing grid and distant mountains before the camera descends for a brief touchdown on a rooftop helipad. The scene then shifts as the vehicle takes off again, gliding away from the waterfront district to soar over a sprawling highway interchange. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle past a building marked 02, overlooking the light trails of traffic on curved ramps as the environment transitions into a landscape of industrial architecture.

The shot follows a continuous flight that transitions from a sprawling industrial waterfront into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched canyons of a dense urban center. It begins by descending toward the Coastview district, gliding past dock buildings and a prominent GRA D IMPER sign while the water below reflects the distant glow of industrial smokestacks. As the vehicle moves forward, the open horizon of the waterfront narrows and shifts into the West Wind Estate. The scene then tightens into an immersive corridor of skyscrapers, where the environment is overtaken by massive holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera weaves through this neon-lit canyon, flanked by a dominant blue fan-shaped hologram and a glowing purple neon face.
